# XCTestSuite

**Class**

A collection of test cases to manage as a test suite.

## Declaration

```swift
class XCTestSuite
```

## Overview

Typically, Xcode automatically manages test suites for you. Only use [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTestSuite] if you need to define your own custom test suites programmatically.

## Creating Test Suites

- **default**: Creates a suite of test suites that represents all test case methods in the current runtime.
- **init(name:)**: Creates a test suite with the specified name.
- **init(forBundlePath:)**: Creates a test suite with the bundle at the specified path.
- **init(forTestCaseClass:)**: Creates a test suite that contains all test methods in the specified class.
- **init(forTestCaseWithName:)**: Creates a test suite that contains a test case with the specified name.

## Managing Tests

- **addTest(_:)**: Adds a test to the test suite.
- **tests**: All tests currently in the test suite.

## Inherits From

- XCTest

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
